'''âng-v-v''' ('''kangavav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:preassess|preassess]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-v-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:preassess|preassess]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âng-v-v
|-
! Lemma
| kangavav
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingavav|thingavav]] || [[word:jingavav|jingavav]] || [[word:shingavav|shingavav]] || [[word:kingavav|kingavav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungavav|thuthungavav]] || [[word:jujungavav|jujungavav]] || [[word:shushungavav|shushungavav]] || [[word:kukungavav|kukungavav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thungavav|thungavav]] || [[word:jungavav|jungavav]] || [[word:shungavav|shungavav]] || [[word:kungavav|kungavav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thungavav|thungavav]] || [[word:jungavav|jungavav]] || [[word:shungavav|shungavav]] || [[word:kungavav|kungavav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thengavav|thengavav]] || [[word:jengavav|jengavav]] || [[word:shengavav|shengavav]] || [[word:kengavav|kengavav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothongavav|thothongavav]] || [[word:jojongavav|jojongavav]] || [[word:shoshongavav|shoshongavav]] || [[word:kokongavav|kokongavav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongavav|thongavav]] || [[word:jongavav|jongavav]] || [[word:shongavav|shongavav]] || [[word:kongavav|kongavav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongavav|thongavav]] || [[word:jongavav|jongavav]] || [[word:shongavav|shongavav]] || [[word:kongavav|kongavav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠngavav|thĂŠngavav]] || [[word:jĂŠngavav|jĂŠngavav]] || [[word:shĂŠngavav|shĂŠngavav]] || [[word:kĂŠngavav|kĂŠngavav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathangavav|thathangavav]] || [[word:jajangavav|jajangavav]] || [[word:shashangavav|shashangavav]] || [[word:kakangavav|kakangavav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangavav|thangavav]] || [[word:jangavav|jangavav]] || [[word:shangavav|shangavav]] || [[word:kangavav|kangavav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangavav|thangavav]] || [[word:jangavav|jangavav]] || [[word:shangavav|shangavav]] || [[word:kangavav|kangavav]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shangavav|shangavav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshangavav|goshangavav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishangavav|gokishangavav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shangavavnĂŒ|shangavavnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshangavavnknĂŒ|goshangavavnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishangavavnĂŒ|gokishangavavnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shangavavshĂ«|shangavavshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshangavavnkshĂ«|goshangavavnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishangavavshĂ«|gokishangavavshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangavavro|shangavavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangavavnkro|goshangavavnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangavavro|gokishangavavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shangavavmu|shangavavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangavavnkmu|goshangavavnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangavavmu|gokishangavavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shangavavsher|shangavavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshangavavnksher|goshangavavnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishangavavsher|gokishangavavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shangavavng|shangavavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshangavavnkng|goshangavavnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishangavavng|gokishangavavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shangavavya|shangavavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshangavavnkya|goshangavavnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishangavavya|gokishangavavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shangavavyam|shangavavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshangavavnkyam|goshangavavnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishangavavyam|gokishangavavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangavavnĂŒshĂ«|shangavavnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangavavnknĂŒshĂ«|goshangavavnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangavavnĂŒshĂ«|gokishangavavnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangavavnĂŒro|shangavavnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangavavnknĂŒro|goshangavavnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangavavnĂŒro|gokishangavavnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangavavnĂŒmu|shangavavnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangavavnknĂŒmu|goshangavavnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangavavnĂŒmu|gokishangavavnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangavavshĂ«nĂŒ|shangavavshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangavavnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshangavavnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangavavshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishangavavshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangavavshĂ«ro|shangavavshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangavavnkshĂ«ro|goshangavavnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangavavshĂ«ro|gokishangavavshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangavavshĂ«mu|shangavavshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangavavnkshĂ«mu|goshangavavnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangavavshĂ«mu|gokishangavavshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangavavronĂŒ|shangavavronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangavavnkronĂŒ|goshangavavnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangavavronĂŒ|gokishangavavronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangavavroshĂ«|shangavavroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangavavnkroshĂ«|goshangavavnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangavavroshĂ«|gokishangavavroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangavavromu|shangavavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangavavnkromu|goshangavavnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangavavromu|gokishangavavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangavavmunĂŒ|shangavavmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangavavnkmunĂŒ|goshangavavnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangavavmunĂŒ|gokishangavavmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangavavmushĂ«|shangavavmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangavavnkmushĂ«|goshangavavnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangavavmushĂ«|gokishangavavmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangavavmuro|shangavavmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangavavnkmuro|goshangavavnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangavavmuro|gokishangavavmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|5445898}}
